description: Plugin-distributed hooks for api-engineering. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags 5 mechanically-detectable API anti-patterns. Spec-only checks fire just on files that declare openapi:/asyncapi:/swagger: — (1) apiKey in query, (2) HTTP Basic scheme, (5) stale OpenAPI 3.0/Swagger 2.0. Code-or-spec checks — (3) hardcoded token/secret literal, (4) wildcard CORS + credentials. Set APIENG_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
